title: Special Military Unit Intelligence Update

"'''Special Military Unit Intelligence Update'''" is an article from [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 15|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 15]], written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]].

It provided updates on various military units since they were introduced in earlier [[West End Games]] products.

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 1997-11-XX -->[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 15|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 15]]
